name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Sacramento residents access Superb Cash Advance at 3657 Florin Rd for quick personal loans in a standalone location with extended daily hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 3657 Florin Rd #150 in Sacramento, CA, in a convenient standalone location accessible from the parking area. The Sacramento branch operates with extended hours to accommodate working professionals and families: Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, Saturday 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, and Sunday 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, making it easy to visit before or after work.

At this Sacramento location, you can apply for personal loans, cash advances, and other credit solutions without appointment delays. Call +1 279-205-8853 during business hours to discuss your options with the loan officers at Superb Cash Advance. The staff can explain current rates, repayment terms, and documentation requirements specific to Sacramento residents.

When visiting the Sacramento branch, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and proof of residency—all required for loan approval. Superb Cash Advance specializes in quick, accessible lending for Sacramento residents who need funds between paychecks or for unexpected expenses.
pros: Extended hours 7 days a week — Mon–Fri 8:30am–8:30pm, Sat–Sun 9:30am–6:30pm
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no-credit-check options
Loan range spans from $250 to $50,000 covering both small-dollar and larger needs
Same-day cash funding available for qualified applicants
Unsecured loan options — no collateral required for most products
Physical storefront with in-person staff, reviewed positively for low-pressure service
Multiple loan product types under one roof (payday, installment, bad credit personal)
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website
Multiple customer reviews reference 'Arvada' (Colorado), not Atlanta — authenticity of location-specific reviews is questionable
Second-lien title loan products carry risk of vehicle loss if borrower defaults
No clear information about whether online applications are processed independently or require in-store follow-up
Payday and cash advance products are likely high-cost; without disclosed rates, borrowers cannot compare costs before visiting
best_for: Atlanta-area borrowers with bad or no credit who need fast cash today
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and want to walk out with funds same day
People who need financial access on weekends or outside standard business hours
Those needing flexible amounts — from a $250 payday bridge to a $50,000 bad-credit personal loan
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best suited for Atlanta-area borrowers with poor or no credit who need immediate cash and prefer dealing with a physical storefront rather than an online lender. The main caveat is a complete absence of rate and fee disclosures — borrowers must visit in person to learn the true cost of borrowing, which is a red flag for comparison shopping and suggests these products likely carry high-cost terms typical of payday lending.
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 3657 Florin Rd, Sacramento, CA. Fast personal loans with extended hours, 7 days a week.
